title: eriosorus × lasseri
intro: Eriosorus × lasseri, also known as Lasser's polypody or Lasser's fern, is a hybrid species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on trees in tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Eriosorus × lasseri include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and improve cardiovascular health, with herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures being used to take advantage of these benefits.
